3270850.name: Keep Your Eyes Open
3270850.description:
Your mum has tasked you with getting a few items from the nearby shop. Once inside, you discover the strange things which happen inside locations owned by Ultrawide. From enormous screens displaying mandatory adverts, to the monster which occasionally appears when you blink.

Make your way around the aisles gathering the items and crossing them off your list as you avoid the monster, reset the power if it goes out and attempt to survive.

If you look hard enough, maybe you can begin to unravel the story behind the untrustworthy Ultrawide company and the events that have been set up around you.
3270850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
